criteria.text: GET /api/financials returns a new receivables object alongside unchanged weekly/daily/revenue (additive, no contract break)
receivables.totalOutstanding = sum of open-invoice balances; openCount = count; Balance=0 invoices excluded
receivables.aging = five buckets Current/1-30/31-60/61-90/90+ days past due (amount+count each), days-past-due in practice timezone, buckets sum to totalOutstanding
receivables DTO is aggregate-only: no customer/patient names or per-invoice identifiers in the response
Invoice query failure/empty degrades receivables to zeroed totals/buckets; never 500s; deposits/spend/revenue unaffected
QuickBooks not connected still returns 503 source_not_connected (auth/connection contract unchanged)
Financials page renders Outstanding A/R KPI tile + aging panel in both Monday and Weekday views; money trend/magnitude-first, no $-prefixed figures
Reading /api/financials records an audit entry (method/path/status/ms) with no financial or patient values
Invoice query errors log references/status only; never invoice balances, customer names, or report payloads
Fixtures mode: generate.js writes synthetic invoices.json across aging buckets; characterization+transforms tests pin receivables totals, bucket math, additive contract; npm test passes offline
